HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

35class GreenFHom3D : public GreenF {
36 private:
38 GaussQuad<GreenFHom3D> gauss;
39
40 public:
41 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
42 // Proximity tests (heuristics to pick smoothed vs. raw kernels)
43 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
49 bool AboveThreshold(rvec r, rvec rp);
50
56 bool AboveThreshold(Triangle* T, Triangle* Tp);
57
58 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
59 // Construction & lifetime
60 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62 GreenFHom3D();
63
68 GreenFHom3D(dcmplx wavelength, dcmplx epsilonMedium);
69
75 GreenFHom3D(dcmplx wavelength, dcmplx epsilonMedium, dcmplx muMedium);
76
78 virtual ~GreenFHom3D(){};
79
80 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
81 // Pointwise kernels
82 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
89 virtual dcmplx Evaluate(rvec r, rvec rp);
90
97 virtual cdyad EvaluateDyadic(rvec r, rvec rp);
98
105 virtual cvec Gradient(rvec r, rvec rp);
106
112 virtual std::tuple<dcmplx, cvec, cdyad> EvaluateAll(rvec r, rvec rp);
113
114 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
115 // Smoothed variants used for near‑singular quadrature
116 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
122 virtual dcmplx Smoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
123
129 virtual dcmplx halfSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
130
136 virtual cvec GradientSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
137
138 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
139 // Triangle and post‑processing integrals
140 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
149 virtual dcmplx IntegrateD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
150
159 virtual dcmplx IntegrateK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
160
167 virtual cvec IntegrateDelta(rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
168
175 virtual cvec IntegrateKappa(rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
176
183 virtual std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
184
191 virtual std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
192
193 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
194 // Assembly helpers
195 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
204 virtual void SameTriDK(
205 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
206 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK);
207
216 virtual void SameTriDKG(
217 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
218 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK,
219 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>& DKG);
220
227 virtual void SameTriDeltaKappa(
228 rvec r, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
229 std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>& DeltaKappa);
230};

GaussQuad.h
Gaussian quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.

Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
